programme.title: Green Book
programme.desc: USA, 1960s. Tony Vallelonga, a simple resident of the Bronx who has a wife and a group of children to support, agrees to accompany, as a chauffeur and bodyguard, a black musician - the luxurious erudite Donald Shirley - on a concert tour across the United States.Not only does he have to defend his protégé from troubles in the Deep South, but he also has to combat prejudiced views.During their journey, they both follow the instructions from the "Green Book" guidebook for African Americans traveling around the country.It includes, among others:suggestions on where to sleep and eat to avoid unpleasant incidents.The time spent together and overcoming mounting problems cause a surprising, lasting bond to emerge between men from different worlds.

credits.actor: George Dyer - the Cellist - Mike Hatton
Copa Coat Check Girl - Maggie Nixon

programme.title: The Great
programme.desc: A continuation of the story about Tsarina Catherine (Elle Fanning), in which facts mix with satire.After the woman recently tried to kill her husband, Piotr (Nicholas Hoult), and imprisoned all his friends, the relationship between them is not good.Meanwhile, Katarzyna also faces political problems.Wanting to solve them, the ruler becomes famous also outside Russia.During this time, Piotr tries to accept the fact that he lives in his wife's shadow.He devotes himself to fatherhood, takes part in hunting and discovers culinary novelties.Finally, they both decide to take a responsible step - they decide to save their marriage Elizabeth and Petrov want to retrieve Peter's body from the lake.While they are waiting for the thaw, the woman tells her companion about her pain.At one point, the concerned woman thinks that her adopted son has taken the form of a wolf and says goodbye to him.Meanwhile, a mourning Catherine walks around the palace dressed in her husband's clothes.However, he soon decides to file a divorce petition in court.This has consequences that are difficult to predict.Grigory becomes friends with Maxim.Together they go deer hunting.

programme.title: Georgie \u0026 Mandy'S First Marriage 2
programme.desc: Young married couple Georgie and Mandy are raising their daughter, learning everyday life in their new role as parents.Each day brings new challenges and fatigue that puts their relationship to the test.

programme.title: Georgie \u0026 Mandy'S First Marriage 2
programme.desc: Young married couple Georgie and Mandy are raising their daughter, learning everyday life in their new role as parents.Each day brings new challenges and fatigue that puts their relationship to the test.

programme.title: Doc Ii.
programme.desc: Dr. Amy Larsen, former chief of internal medicine, is rebuilding her life after a tragic accident that left her with no memory.Now she is an intern.Her past still haunts me.

programme.title: Alien: Romulus
programme.desc: The year 2142. The Jackson's Star mining colony was established on the distant planet LV-410.The workers include orphaned Rain (Cailee Spaeny) and Andy (David Jonsson), a robot reprogrammed by her father.The girl wants to escape to a better world, but her forced labor contract is extended by the corporation.Together with his brother android, he joins the rebels who discovered that there is an abandoned research station hovering over the planet.The fugitives get aboard and discover cryogenic chambers, thanks to which they can make a long interplanetary journey.However, they do not know that there is also a bloodthirsty beast on the ship that they will have to face.A continuation of the famous SF horror series, well received by critics and viewers.The action takes place between the events of "Alien - 8th Passenger of the Nostromo" by Ridley Scott and "Alien - The Decisive Engagement" by James Cameron.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1980s. The life of bullied teenage Niall (Mitchell Robertson) turns upside down when the son of his mother's partner, the fierce and unpredictable Ruben (Stuart Campbell), comes to live with them for a while.Even though they are not related by blood, over time they both become inseparable.However, subsequent events make them move away from each other.Three decades later, Ruben (Richard Gadd) shows up uninvited at Niall's (Jamie Bell) wedding.It soon becomes clear why he reconnected with his long-lost brother.A suggestive story about the fragility of male relationships, brotherhood, betrayal, loyalty and violence.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: Chicago.Harry Rawlings (Liam Neeson) and his companions steal $2 million.mob boss Jamal Manning (Brian Tyree Henry).However, they die while escaping from the police.The gangster demands that Veronica (Viola Davis), Harry's widow, return the cash he intended to spend on his city council election campaign.Soon, the woman receives the key to the safe from her husband's chauffeur, Bash (Garret Dillahunt).He finds Harry's laptop and a plan to steal $5 million from the house of Jack Mulligan (Colin Farrell), Manning's election rival.He decides to make the jump.He recruits the help of other widows of Harry's gang members, Alice (Elizabeth Debicki) and Linda (Michelle Rodriguez).The latter's children's guardian, Belle (Cynthia Erivo), also joins them.

programme.title: Georgie \u0026 Mandy'S First Marriage 2
programme.desc: Young married couple Georgie and Mandy are raising their daughter, learning everyday life in their new role as parents.Each day brings new challenges and fatigue that puts their relationship to the test.

programme.title: Georgie \u0026 Mandy'S First Marriage 2
programme.desc: Young married couple Georgie and Mandy are raising their daughter, learning everyday life in their new role as parents.Each day brings new challenges and fatigue that puts their relationship to the test.

programme.title: Hail Mary
programme.desc: Popular writer Maria (Laura Weissmahr) has recently become a mother.Her days are filled with caring for her son and visiting doctors.There is virtually no time left to create.To make matters worse, the husband keeps postponing the promised paternity leave and ignores the difficulties his wife is facing.At this time, Barcelona is shaken by information about the crime committed by a young French woman who drowned her 10-month-old twins in the bathtub.Maria follows this case with increasing attention, which slowly becomes her obsession.

programme.title: Alles Fifty Fifty
programme.desc: Despite the divorce, Marion (Laura Tonke) and Andi (Moritz Bleibtreu) consider themselves exemplary parents of eleven-year-old Milan (Valentin Thatenhorst).They share custody of their son and care for him.So they are surprised when they are called to an interview at the school, during which they learn that the boy is causing a lot of problems.In this situation, they decide to take him on a holiday together to Italy.Marion's new boyfriend, Robin (David Kross), also accompanies them on the trip.Both parents quickly notice that Milan often acts like a spoiled only child, and they come to the conclusion that they need to work on raising him.The time they spend together and their shared efforts make them grow closer again.At the same time, their son falls in love for the first time.

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: Alita (Rosa Salazar), a cyborg girl, wakes up from a coma.It turns out that he doesn't remember who he is or where he is.Doctor Ido (Christoph Waltz) subjected her to a series of tests that revealed that she was a young woman with a unique story.Wanting to protect her, he does not reveal the truth about her past.Alita must adapt to the conditions and rules of life in Scrap City.After some time, he regains his memory thanks to the help of his friend, Hugo (Keean Johnson).Then he realizes that he has incredible fighting skills.She must use them against the power that tries to control her.The film's director is Robert Rodriguez, known from "From Dusk Till Dawn" and "Machete".The script was written by the winner of three Oscars, James Cameron, who considered making "Alita" back in the 1990s. The film was based on the manga.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn - Part 2
programme.desc: Bella and Edward are already married.However, the young couple did not have time to enjoy each other.The girl quickly became pregnant, but it turned out that it was life-threatening.Edward couldn't watch his beloved suffer and made the dramatic decision to transform her into a vampire.This was the only way he could save Bella from dying during the grueling labor.After the metamorphosis, the young woman improves her skills and learns to control her hunger.Together with her husband, she enjoys watching the rapid development of her extraordinary daughter, Renesmee, who at the age of three months looks like a two-year-old and can show her thoughts through images.The family idyll does not last long.There is a suspicion that the girl is an immortal child whose existence is against the law established by the Volturi.Renesmee and her parents are at risk of death.Edward and his family decide to defend themselves.They summon vampires from all corners of the world and prepare to confront the Volturi.

programme.title: Ballers 5
programme.desc: Spencer Strasmore, although his career as an American football star has already ended, still leads an exciting life.Now his job is to help people trying to make it in the world of sports.

programme.title: Ballers 5
programme.desc: Spencer Strasmore, although his career as an American football star has already ended, still leads an exciting life.Now his job is to help people trying to make it in the world of sports.

programme.title: Passengers
programme.desc: A group of people set off on a spaceship to a planet intended for colonization in a distant galaxy.Since the journey is expected to last 120 years, the expedition participants are put into hibernation.Unfortunately, the system turns out to be unreliable and mechanic Jim wakes up early.Because he feels lonely, he decides to find a companion.His choice falls on the charming writer Aurora.He wakes her up from sleep.They fall in love, but the idyll does not last long.They discover that the spaceship they are traveling on is in great danger, and the lives of other passengers depend only on them.They also gradually realize why their waking up was not accidental.Soon the couple's love is put to a difficult test.

programme.title: Monsters vs Aliens: Mutant Pumpkins from Outer Space
programme.desc: Susan Murphy and a group of friendly monsters undertake another mission.Just before Halloween, a trace of aliens was found in the girl's hometown.Everything looked normal though.Unexpectedly, on the day of the holiday, the innocent-looking pumpkin lanterns reveal their true colors.It turns out to be an invasion of aliens who plan to conquer Earth.Susan, called Ginormica, and a team of "freaks of nature" start a fight against mutated pumpkins... In the Polish language version, the characters provided their voices, among others:Barbara Kałużna, Wojciech Paszkowski and Grzegorz Pawlak.

programme.title: Twisters
programme.desc: Student Kate Cooper (Daisy Edgar-Jones) and her friends track down tornadoes.When meeting one of them in Oklahoma, the situation gets out of control.Only she and Javier (Anthony Ramos) survive the clash with the elements.Five years pass.Based in New York, Kate still studies tornadoes, but only on computer screens.One day, Javier stops by her office.He asks her to join his team for a week so that he can test a new system that detects these dangerous weather phenomena.Initially, the girl, who is still struggling with the trauma, refuses, but eventually decides to cooperate, even though it involves a return to Oklahoma.There, she meets the charming and reckless Tyler Owens (Glen Powell), who, together with his team, records and posts videos of encounters with tornadoes on the Internet - the more dangerous, the better.Soon it becomes clear that a storm of unimaginable strength is approaching them.Kate, Tyler and their rival teams come face to face with a powerful threat.To survive, they must learn to cooperate.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: Chicago.Harry Rawlings (Liam Neeson) and his companions steal $2 million.mob boss Jamal Manning (Brian Tyree Henry).However, they die while escaping from the police.The gangster demands that Veronica (Viola Davis), Harry's widow, return the cash he intended to spend on his city council election campaign.Soon, the woman receives the key to the safe from her husband's chauffeur, Bash (Garret Dillahunt).He finds Harry's laptop and a plan to steal $5 million from the house of Jack Mulligan (Colin Farrell), Manning's election rival.He decides to make the jump.He recruits the help of other widows of Harry's gang members, Alice (Elizabeth Debicki) and Linda (Michelle Rodriguez).The latter's children's guardian, Belle (Cynthia Erivo), also joins them.

programme.title: The Great
programme.desc: A continuation of the story about Tsarina Catherine (Elle Fanning), in which facts mix with satire.After the woman recently tried to kill her husband, Piotr (Nicholas Hoult), and imprisoned all his friends, the relationship between them is not good.Meanwhile, Katarzyna also faces political problems.Wanting to solve them, the ruler becomes famous also outside Russia.During this time, Piotr tries to accept the fact that he lives in his wife's shadow.He devotes himself to fatherhood, takes part in hunting and discovers culinary novelties.Finally, they both decide to take a responsible step - they decide to save their marriage.
